news.title: HRTI Private Ltd sold 400,371 shares of Olectra Greentech at avg price of 1087.05.
news.summary: HRTI Private Ltd sold 400,371 shares of Olectra Greentech at avg price of 1087.05.

news.title:
Electric mobility stocks, led by JBM Auto, surged up to 14% on March 18, driven by strong volumes.
JBM Auto, Olectra Greentech, Ather Energy, and Ola Electric saw notable gains, with JBM Auto reversing March losses.
news.summary:
Electric mobility stocks, led by JBM Auto, surged up to 14% on March 18, driven by strong volumes.
JBM Auto, Olectra Greentech, Ather Energy, and Ola Electric saw notable gains, with JBM Auto reversing March losses.

news.title:
Olectra Greentech informed exchanges about an arbitration award disallowing Rs 10 Cr capital advance claim by M.L.R. Motors.
Tribunal directed Rs 5 lakh reimbursement for legal costs; company reviewing order and may challenge it in court.
news.summary:
Olectra Greentech informed exchanges about an arbitration award disallowing Rs 10 Cr capital advance claim by M.L.R. Motors.
Tribunal directed Rs 5 lakh reimbursement for legal costs; company reviewing order and may challenge it in court.

news.title:
Olectra secures Rs 1,800 crore order; buses to be delivered in 20 months.
The transactions with EVEY are related party deals on an arm's length basis.
news.summary:
Olectra secures Rs 1,800 crore order; buses to be delivered in 20 months.
The transactions with EVEY are related party deals on an arm's length basis.

news.title:
Olectra Greentech bags Rs.1,800 Cr order for 1,085 electric buses from Telangana RTC.
Buses to be delivered in 20 months; maintenance by Olectra for 12 years under GCC model.
news.summary:
Olectra Greentech bags Rs.1,800 Cr order for 1,085 electric buses from Telangana RTC.
Buses to be delivered in 20 months; maintenance by Olectra for 12 years under GCC model.

news.title:
Olectra Greentech secures an order worth ₹1,800 crore, enhancing growth.
This order strengthens Olectra's position in the green technology sector.
news.summary:
Olectra Greentech secures an order worth ₹1,800 crore, enhancing growth.
This order strengthens Olectra's position in the green technology sector.

news.title:
Olectra Greentech appoints Mr. K.N.M. Rao as VP, Product Development, e-Bus Division effective Feb 5, 2026.
Mr. Rao, an industry veteran, has held leadership roles at SWITCH Mobility, Ashok Leyland, Mahindra & Tata Motors.
news.summary:
Olectra Greentech appoints Mr. K.N.M. Rao as VP, Product Development, e-Bus Division effective Feb 5, 2026.
Mr. Rao, an industry veteran, has held leadership roles at SWITCH Mobility, Ashok Leyland, Mahindra & Tata Motors.

news.title:
Olectra Greentech revises FY'26 vehicle delivery target to 1,500-2,000 units from 2,000.
Insulator Division aims for INR 300 crore revenue with 10%-15% annual growth.
news.summary:
Olectra Greentech revises FY'26 vehicle delivery target to 1,500-2,000 units from 2,000.
Insulator Division aims for INR 300 crore revenue with 10%-15% annual growth.

news.title:
Olectra Greentech's Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹932M from ₹789M YoY.
EBITDA margin declined to 14.05% from 15.32% YoY.
news.summary:
Olectra Greentech's Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹932M from ₹789M YoY.
EBITDA margin declined to 14.05% from 15.32% YoY.

news.title:
Olectra Greentech's board to meet on Feb 2, 2026, to approve Q3 FY2025 unaudited results.
Trading window remains closed from Jan 1 to Feb 4, 2026, per insider trading regulations.
news.summary:
Olectra Greentech's board to meet on Feb 2, 2026, to approve Q3 FY2025 unaudited results.
Trading window remains closed from Jan 1 to Feb 4, 2026, per insider trading regulations.

news.title: Olectra revises FY26 delivery guidance to 1500-2000 units, down from 2000-2500 units.
news.summary: Olectra revises FY26 delivery guidance to 1500-2000 units, down from 2000-2500 units.

news.title:
Olectra Greentech's Hyderabad EV bus plant begins operations on 31 Dec 2025.
Phase I capacity is 2,500 buses/year, half of the planned 5,000 buses/year.
news.summary:
Olectra Greentech's Hyderabad EV bus plant begins operations on 31 Dec 2025.
Phase I capacity is 2,500 buses/year, half of the planned 5,000 buses/year.

news.title:
Olectra Greentech's (NSE:OLECTRA) 5-year shareholder returns surged 896%, outpacing its 79% annual EPS growth.
Despite a 31% drop in 3 months and 25% yearly loss, long-term shareholders gained 58% annually over 5 years.
news.summary:
Olectra Greentech's (NSE:OLECTRA) 5-year shareholder returns surged 896%, outpacing its 79% annual EPS growth.
Despite a 31% drop in 3 months and 25% yearly loss, long-term shareholders gained 58% annually over 5 years.

news.title:
Olectra Greentech faced a Rs 2.6 crore penalty from TSIIC for delay in its EV facility.
The delay spans Nov 2023 to Nov 2025, though partial operations began on time.
news.summary:
Olectra Greentech faced a Rs 2.6 crore penalty from TSIIC for delay in its EV facility.
The delay spans Nov 2023 to Nov 2025, though partial operations began on time.

news.title:
Olectra Greentech Ltd shared the transcript of its Q2 FY25 earnings call held on Nov 12, 2025.
Transcript link is available on the company's website under investor relations for public access.
news.summary:
Olectra Greentech Ltd shared the transcript of its Q2 FY25 earnings call held on Nov 12, 2025.
Transcript link is available on the company's website under investor relations for public access.

news.title:
Captain Pipes reports net profit drop of 16.5% to Rs 0.71 cr in Q2 FY25.
Sales rise 37% YoY to Rs 17.3 cr despite profit decline compared to Q2 FY24.
news.summary:
Captain Pipes reports net profit drop of 16.5% to Rs 0.71 cr in Q2 FY25.
Sales rise 37% YoY to Rs 17.3 cr despite profit decline compared to Q2 FY24.

news.title:
Olectra Greentech issued revised undertaking to REC for Rs.300 Cr, replacing earlier Rs.2,500 Cr sanction.
Funds advance tied to MSRTC bus procurement; includes indemnity and refund terms for delivery delays.
news.summary:
Olectra Greentech issued revised undertaking to REC for Rs.300 Cr, replacing earlier Rs.2,500 Cr sanction.
Funds advance tied to MSRTC bus procurement; includes indemnity and refund terms for delivery delays.

news.title:
Olectra Greentech posted Q2 net profit of ₹494.3M, up from ₹475.6M YoY.
Revenue rose to ₹6.57B vs ₹5.24B YoY; EBITDA margin fell to 13.6% from 15.5% YoY.
news.summary:
Olectra Greentech posted Q2 net profit of ₹494.3M, up from ₹475.6M YoY.
Revenue rose to ₹6.57B vs ₹5.24B YoY; EBITDA margin fell to 13.6% from 15.5% YoY.

news.title:
113 companies, including Usha Martin, Olectra Greentech, and Greenlam Industries, will announce Q2FY26 results today.
Oil & Gas, tech, cement, and capital goods sectors drive 86% of Q2 earnings growth; Nifty 50 down 0.07% at 25,492.30.
news.summary:
113 companies, including Usha Martin, Olectra Greentech, and Greenlam Industries, will announce Q2FY26 results today.
Oil & Gas, tech, cement, and capital goods sectors drive 86% of Q2 earnings growth; Nifty 50 down 0.07% at 25,492.30.

news.title:
Olectra Greentech announces a conference call on Nov 12, 2025, at 11 AM.
Call to discuss Q2/H1 2025 unaudited financial results, facilitated by Nomura.
news.summary:
Olectra Greentech announces a conference call on Nov 12, 2025, at 11 AM.
Call to discuss Q2/H1 2025 unaudited financial results, facilitated by Nomura.
